agent.plan.description: Break the request into a concrete frontend implementation plan.

goal.description: Short description of the build goal (optional; a default is used if omitted).

agent.inspect.description: Inspect the current project tree or a specific set of files.

targets.description: Optional absolute project paths to inspect.

agent.search.description: Search filenames and file contents for a query.

query.description: Text to search for across the current project.

agent.read.description: Read specific files for editing context.

targets.description: Absolute project paths to read (max 2–3 per call).

agent.create.description: Create new frontend files in the current workspace.

intent.description: Short reason for the new files (recommended).

files.description: Map of absolute project paths to full file contents (string or { code }). Arrays of { path, code } are also accepted by the runtime.

targets.description: Optional path list matching the written files.

agent.edit.description: Update an existing frontend file with full file contents.

files.description: Map of one absolute path to full file contents. Arrays of { path, code } are also accepted.

targets.description: Optional path list matching the written file.

agent.patch.description: Apply a targeted search-and-replace edit to one existing file without rewriting the whole file.

path.description: Absolute project path to the file.

search.description: Exact substring to find (must appear at least once).

replaceAll.description: Replace every occurrence instead of only the first.

agent.rename.description: Rename a file without changing its contents.

agent.delete.description: Delete obsolete files from the current workspace.

targets.description: Exactly one absolute project path to remove.

checks.description: Optional named checks. Valid labels (case-insensitive): entry exists, imports resolve, project has files, dependencies align, entry bootstrap exists.

runtime.sync_workspace.description: Write the in-memory project to the active runtime disk workspace before installs or builds.

runtime.install_dependencies.description: Install project dependencies in the active runtime workspace.

runtime.run_command.description: Run an allowed command in the active runtime workspace.

command.description: For local runtime: npm install, npm run build, npm run dev, npm test, or npm run lint. Cloudflare: passed to sandbox.exec.

runtime.verify_build.description: Run the production build in the runtime workspace; required evidence before agent.complete.

runtime.start_preview.description: Start the runtime dev server and expose a preview URL.

runtime.get_logs.description: Read captured output from the active runtime process or last command.

processId.description: Optional process id returned by runtime.start_preview (local preview ids look like {workspaceId}-preview).

agent.complete.description: Commit final metadata and finish the generation cycle.

summary.description: Short summary of what was created or updated.

entry.description: Absolute path to the final entry file.

dependencies.description: Dependency map to merge into the project.
